ucl-2026.title: Road to Munich: Quarter-Final Preview
ucl-2026.content:
The giants of Europe converge this week. After a thrilling round of 16, the tactical landscape has shifted significantly...

Key Tactical Battles

Expect high-pressing lines and rapid transitions as the favorites look to secure an early lead.

taifa-stars.title: Taifa Stars: Preparing for AFCON Qualifiers
taifa-stars.content:
The national team has entered camp in Dar es Salaam. Coach's focus remains on defensive solidity and clinical finishing.

  • Injury updates: Samatta is fit.
  • New call-ups: Two youth prospects from Arusha.
